name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar

name: Nano Banana 2
description: « This AI image technology from Google DeepMind generates or edits images from 512 px up to 4K from text, images, or both. You can create accurate illustrations with readable text, infographics, multi-image montages, and more

name: Atoms
description: « This powerful platform transforms an idea into a complete web application. A team of AI agents designs the pages, writes the full-stack code, configures the database, tests, and then deploys the project without you having to code anything yourself. Code export with GitHub synchronization included

name: Taylor CPAI by Deduction
description: « A tax assistant who analyzes your income, expenses, and documents to find deductions and credits that are sometimes overlooked. They prepare a tax return that is ready to file, with review and validation by a certified public accountant for added security

name: Voila Voice io
description: « You import a PDF, slides, or a web page, and the platform automatically creates a lesson with voice-overs, avatars, quizzes, and content translated into more than 30 languages. You can adjust the tone and speed and easily export the result

name: Text to Song
description: « A generator that creates a complete song from a few lines of text. You choose the style, speed, and type of voice, then download a track ready to use in your videos or projects

name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
description: « A Google AI model capable of handling complex tasks involving text, images, audio, or video. It can summarize lengthy sources, analyze data, and assist in coding end-to-end interfaces

name: Lyria 3
description: « This AI music model creates 30-second tracks with vocals, lyrics, and instruments from a simple text description or image. You choose the style, tempo, and voice type, and Lyria 3 generates a smooth, realistic track directly in the Gemini app

name: LitVideo
description: « Create AI videos from text, images, or videos, and the platform automatically selects the best model (Sora 2, Kling, PixVerse, Vidu, etc.). Easily add subtitles, effects, and music tailored to Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube formats

name: Sonnet 4.6
description: « An intermediate model from Anthropic that offers a very good balance between power, cost, and speed. It greatly improves code, follows technical instructions better, and is becoming the default model for everyday uses, from chat to programming

name: AI Color Analysis
description: « Upload a photo and AI will determine your color season (12 seasons), skin undertone, and ideal shades. The tool will then suggest palettes for clothing, makeup, and hair to help you choose the best colors for everyday wear

name: Grok 4.20
description: « This version of Grok brings together four professor-level agents who reason together before responding. They correct each other, break down problems, and rely on real-time web search and coding tools to provide more reliable answers
